reason: Global TianChen-RV architecture and RVV Stage 2 authority rules for this task.
RVV plugin-owned typed body realization, direct contraction provider ownership, legality, and fail-closed authority placement.

Widening-MAcc generated-bundle evidence, runtime ssh rvv requirements, and FileCheck/C++ testing contracts.
Capability/profile facts must constrain provider legality instead of defining RVV route semantics.
Keep widening MAcc logic inside the RVV plugin/provider and target validation boundary.
Ensure the path remains typed low-level tcrv_rvv body realization, not a high-level compute frontend.

Implemented canonical widening MAcc fact surface and provider-plan fail-closed validation for ABI order, SEW/LMUL, layouts, intrinsics, headers, type mapping, binding summary, and provider mirror.
Rewired widening MAcc target validation to consume provider facts and emit targeted fail-closed diagnostics for stale binding, dtype/config, layout/relation, intrinsic, header/type, and mirror facts.

Extended generated-bundle evidence and runtime harness checks for provider-derived widening boundary facts, two signed input patterns, runtime n/AVL, source and accumulator preservation, and tail sentinels.

Tightened explicit selected-body PLAN/HEADER checks for the same provider-derived widening MAcc route facts.

Anchored dry-run evidence and harness checks for explicit widening MAcc provider facts and negative old-authority markers.
